arts.ttl: Chelsea can move one step closer to sealing bargain Liam Delap transfer this weekend
arts.sum: The sooner Ipswich are relegated, the sooner Chelsea will know for definite that Delap's release clause will stand at £30m, even if it looks likely that the Tractor Boys will finish inside the bottom three. When Delap signed his five-year contract at Ipswich last summer, there was a clause inserted that he could leave for £10m less if the club didn't stay in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on whether Palmer and Jackson will play, Chelsea latest injury news
arts.sum: For sure, tomorrow will be even more, but I always said the same that the players, they are lucky, they have to think that they are lucky to experience that kind of games and that kind of moment." It's because you feel that and probably tomorrow night they're going to have this kind of extra player but we need to be good enough to manage that situation."

arts.ttl: Chelsea Conference League prize money so far as Arsenal Champions League earnings gulf highlighted
arts.sum: Additional money is then on offer for how far a club progresses in the competition, with £3.348million to be awarded to each team reaching the final. Chelsea have fared extremely well in the competition so far after topping the league phase table with six wins from six and then beating FC Copenhagen over two legs in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea keen to sign 34 G/A forward with €100m release clause
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly among the clubs keen on a potential summer transfer window swoop for in-form Benfica striker Vangelis Pavlidis. The Greece international has been on fire in the Portuguese league this season, establishing himself as an exciting talent and attracting interest from bigger clubs.
